pi_items.source: Verified against IMPORT_DIR and filename in setup_task.sh
Verified against PORTFOLIO_PATH definition in export_result.sh and setup_task.sh
Verified by inspecting the CSV file dynamically generated in setup_task.sh

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetically generated data created dynamically during environment setup. The input CSV file path is explicitly defined as /home/ga/Documents/import_portfolio.csv in setup_task.sh. The expected output portfolio path /home/ga/.jstock/1.0.7/UnitedState/portfolios/My Portfolio/buyportfolio.csv correctly matches the path checked by the verification script. The required portfolio positions (TSLA: 30, META: 40, JPM: 60, V: 20, JNJ: 45) match the exact values populated into the synthetic CSV.
